case_title: SANTANA, EDUARDO VS CHASE BANK USA, N.A.

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
CHALLENGE OF VENUE FILED BY DEFT, COPIES MAILED TO ALL PARTIES. CHALLENGE WAS RECEIVED LATE.
COURTESY COPY TO THE COURT OF LETTER FROM DEFT TO PLTF RE PAYMENT OF JUDGEMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHASE BANK USA, N.A.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2007 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANTANA, EDUARDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHASE BANK USA, N.A. $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,150.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-14-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-09-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 DEFT'S VENUE CHALLENGE DENIED. CON'T FOR TRIAL. PRIOR TO TRIAL, THE PARTIES SHALL ENGAGE IN GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS. PLFT MAY CONTACT DEFT AT: CHASE BANK USA N.A. 200 WHITE CLAY DRIVE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SANTANA, EDUARDO AS TO DEFENDANT CHASE BANK USA, N.A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
